title: Base + SaaS dual deployment profile and storage abstraction
description:
PipeShare now runs from one codebase with a shared deploymentProfile (feature flags, storage layout, tenant host detection) on both Mike's private base and the subscription SaaS platform.

Added resolveStorageBackend for portal Wasabi access, migrated login/signup/inspection/cPanel branches off scattered hostname checks, auto subscription gate on tenant subdomain customer login, and OVH dual-PM2 templates (Base :3000, SaaS :3001).

Deploy dual backend: copy env.base + env.saas templates, run deploy/ovh/setup-dual-backend.sh, reload nginx.

Who is affected: OVH operators; SaaS tenants unchanged except customer login gate on unpaid subscriptions.
changeLog: Login subscription gate on tenant hosts for customer accounts.
Frontend: deployment-profile.js replaces scattered mode/host checks.
